Description: The TPS62088 is a high-efficiency, high-frequency synchronous step-down DC-DC converter designed for small solution size and high efficiency. It operates from a 2.4 V to 5.5 V input range, supports up to 3 A output current, and uses a 4 MHz switching frequency to minimize external component size. The device employs DCS-Control™ topology for excellent load transient performance and output regulation, and it automatically transitions between PWM mode at medium‑to‑heavy loads and Power Save Mode at light loads to maintain efficiency across the load range. Integrated features include over‑current protection, thermal shutdown, active output discharge, and a power‑good indicator.

KeyParameters.Package Options: 6‑pin WCSP (YFP: 0.8 mm × 1.2 mm × 0.5 mm; YWC: 0.8 mm × 1.2 mm × 0.3 mm)

Functions.FunctionDescription: Device enable. Pull high to enable, low to disable. Do not leave floating.
Open‑drain power‑good output. Pull‑up resistor can be connected to ≤5.5 V. Leave floating if unused.
Feedback input. For fixed‑output versions, connect directly to output.
Switching node of the power stage. Connect to inductor.
Power supply input (2.4 V to 5.5 V).
